requirement: Configure TLS clients to exclude RC4 cipher suites from ClientHello messages.
evidence_quote: TLS clients MUST NOT include RC4 cipher suites in the ClientHello message.

source_name: RFC 7465: Prohibiting RC4 Cipher Suites
requirement: Configure TLS servers to reject RC4 cipher suite selection and terminate handshakes if only RC4 is offered.
evidence_quote: TLS servers MUST NOT select an RC4 cipher suite... If the TLS client only offers RC4 cipher suites, the TLS server MUST terminate the handshake.
